title: Xtra Crunchy Algerian Lamb Kebabs
description: A briny and crunchy post-workout Algerian dish featuring fajita seasoning and lardons-render, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together fajita seasoning, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the kebabs for 10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the kebabs are grilling, heat the rendered lardons in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Once the kebabs are done, brush them with the heated lardons and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
